name: Miguel's Painting
tagline: Interior & exterior painting across Sonoma, Marin & Napa since 2005
seoDescription: Miguel's Painting is a Santa Rosa painting contractor for interior and exterior repaints, cabinet refinishing, drywall and ceiling work across Sonoma, Marin, and Napa counties. Owner-operated by Miguel Gomez. CA Lic. #868955, BBB A+.

images.heroAlt: Two-story Mediterranean stucco home freshly repainted in warm tan against a clear blue sky by Miguel's Painting

sections.heading: North Bay repaints with a finish that lasts
sections.subheading: Owner-operated painting for homes and businesses across Sonoma, Marin, and Napa counties — careful prep, clean lines, and coatings built to hold up.

image.alt: Two-story Mediterranean stucco home freshly repainted in warm tan against a clear blue sky by Miguel's Painting

items.title: Exterior Painting
items.description: Full exterior repaints with thorough prep, repairs, and durable coatings chosen to hold up to the North Bay sun and weather.

items.title: Interior Painting
items.description: Walls, ceilings, trim, and doors painted with clean lines and careful protection of your floors and furnishings.

items.title: Cabinet Refinishing
items.description: Kitchen and bath cabinets refinished and recoated for a smooth, factory-like finish without the cost of replacement.

items.title: Drywall & Ceiling Repair
items.description: Drywall patching plus popcorn and stipple ceiling removal to leave a smooth, paint-ready surface.

items.title: Wallpaper & Faux Finishes
items.description: Wallpaper removal and decorative faux finishes, color washes, and wood finishing for a custom look.

items.title: Deck & Floor Coatings
items.description: Deck staining and waterproofing plus epoxy floor coatings that protect surfaces and stand up to traffic.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Miguel's Painting and tell us about your project.

items.title: Free estimate
items.body: We walk the job with you, talk through colors and finishes, and give you a clear written estimate.

items.title: Prep & paint
items.body: Our crew preps surfaces, protects your property, and applies quality coatings the right way.

items.title: Walk-through
items.body: We review the finished work together and don't call it done until you're satisfied.

sections.heading: A hands-on local painter
body: Miguel's Painting is an owner-operated painting contractor based in Santa Rosa, run by Miguel Gomez since 2005. For two decades the company has painted homes and businesses across the North Bay, building a reputation for honest work, careful prep, and finishes that hold up.

Every job is handled directly by a local owner who listens to your goals — from a single room to a full exterior repaint, kitchen cabinets, drywall and ceiling work, or decorative finishes. The crew treats every property as if it were their own, and the aim on each project is simple: do the job right the first time.
highlights: Owner-operated since 2005 — 20 years in the North Bay

image.alt: Bright interior kitchen with freshly painted white cabinetry and trim by Miguel's Painting

sections.heading: Ready for a fresh coat?
sections.body: Call (707) 888-7174 for a free estimate, or reach out and tell us about your project. Based in Santa Rosa, serving the whole North Bay.

sections.heading: How we can help
sections.subheading: Interior and exterior painting plus cabinet, drywall, and finish work for homes and businesses across the North Bay.

items.title: Exterior Painting
items.description: Full exterior repaints with thorough prep, surface repairs, and durable coatings chosen to hold up to North Bay sun and weather. We protect landscaping and leave the site clean.

items.title: Interior Painting
items.description: Walls, ceilings, trim, and doors painted with clean lines. We move and cover furniture, protect floors, and keep the workspace tidy from start to finish.

items.title: Cabinet Refinishing
items.description: Kitchen and bath cabinets cleaned, prepped, and recoated for a smooth, factory-like finish — a fraction of the cost of replacement.

items.title: Drywall & Ceiling Work
items.description: Drywall patching and repair plus popcorn and stipple ceiling removal, leaving a smooth, paint-ready surface.

items.title: Wallpaper, Faux & Wood Finishes
items.description: Wallpaper removal, decorative faux finishes, color washes, and wood finishing for a custom, hand-applied look.

items.title: Deck & Floor Coatings
items.description: Deck cleaning, staining, and waterproofing plus epoxy floor coatings that protect surfaces and stand up to daily traffic.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Miguel's Painting and tell us about your project.

items.title: Free estimate
items.body: We walk the job with you, talk through colors and finishes, and give you a clear written estimate.

items.title: Prep & paint
items.body: Our crew preps surfaces, protects your property, and applies quality coatings the right way.

items.title: Walk-through
items.body: We review the finished work together and don't call it done until you're satisfied.

items.a: We're based in Santa Rosa and serve Sonoma, Marin, and Napa counties — including Rohnert Park, Windsor, Petaluma, Novato, Sonoma, and Napa.
Yes. Miguel's Painting is a licensed California contractor (Lic. #868955) and is BBB A+ accredited.

items.q: Do you do both interior and exterior work?
items.a: We do both, for homes and businesses — plus cabinet refinishing, drywall and ceiling work, and decorative finishes.

items.q: How do I get an estimate?
items.a: Call (707) 888-7174 or send us a message and we'll set up a free, no-pressure estimate.

sections.heading: Get a free estimate
sections.blurb: Reach Miguel's Painting at (707) 888-7174 or stop by 3545 Moorland Ave, Santa Rosa, CA 95407. We serve Sonoma, Marin, and Napa counties.

flags: Facts verified June 2026 via BBB (A+ accredited since 2010, started 2005, CA Lic. #868955, 5 employees, serves Sonoma/Marin/Napa), their own site mgppainting.net, Yellowpages, and Facebook. Owner Miguel Gomez (MGP Inc.).

Three real project photos kept from their Facebook/site gallery (warm-tan stucco exterior as hero, an interior kitchen, a white single-story exterior) — all congruent, in-frame, and sharp. The charcoal-home shot was dropped from the hero/galleries during vision QA because its lower third is cluttered with job-site debris (dumpster, safety fence, panels), which read as 'mid-construction' rather than a finished result and undercut the cold-link first impression. The dated low-res logo and the template's stock images were rejected earlier.
No verified review count or testimonial quotes (BBB shows 0 reviews) — testimonials/rating intentionally omitted, not fabricated.
No confirmed email — add a real email or contact form before sending.
